title: Find Diamonds
description: This mod will allow you to find diamonds easily
body:
# 💎 Find Diamonds

A client-side mod that highlights exposed diamond ore with dynamic lighting and particle effects, making cave exploration more efficient and visually appealing.

## ✨ Features

- **Smart Detection**: Automatically finds exposed diamond ore within configurable radius (8-64 blocks)
- **Visual Effects**: Beautiful particle effects around discovered diamonds
- **Environment Darkening**: Dims other light sources to make diamonds stand out
- **Easy Toggle**: Press `G` to enable/disable the mod instantly

## ⚙️ Configuration

- **Search Radius**: How far to scan (8-64 blocks)
- **Glow Intensity**: Brightness of diamond lighting (0-200%)
- **Update Interval**: Scan frequency (in ticks)
- **Darkening**: How much to dim other lights (0-100%)

Configure via Mod Menu or edit `config/find-diamonds.json`

---

*Client-side only - works on any server! 💎*
